channel.title: Comments on: Episode 15 – Dogfish Head Punkin Ale
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: A GREAT Dogfish beer I'll be doing for the holidays is a seasonal called Red and White - best beer he brews in my opinion! I believe it won gold at this years GABF.
item.content:encoded: A GREAT Dogfish beer I’ll be doing for the holidays is a seasonal called Red and White – best beer he brews in my opinion! I believe it won gold at this years GABF.

item.title: By: Killian Jack
item.dc:creator: Killian Jack
item.description: I agree on the alcohol nose Travis - but that's kind of Dogfish Head's signature. The 90 Minute IPA and Raison D'Extra will knock you on your a$$$$$!!!!
item.content:encoded: I agree on the alcohol nose Travis – but that’s kind of Dogfish Head’s signature. The 90 Minute IPA and Raison D’Extra will knock you on your a$$$$$!!!!

item.title: By: Travis
item.dc:creator: Travis
item.description: I was underwhelmed with the agressiveness of this beer. At 7% it does have a huge alcohol nose. You guys hit it on the head with the seasonal. Pumpkin ... sorry, Punkin Ales are best enjoyed inside while it's raining outside. Oh, and cranberry sauce FTL!
item.content:encoded: I was underwhelmed with the agressiveness of this beer. At 7% it does have a huge alcohol nose. You guys hit it on the head with the seasonal. Pumpkin … sorry, Punkin Ales are best enjoyed inside while it’s raining outside. Oh, and cranberry sauce FTL!
